fields.label: Hero image
fields.name: hero_image
fields.instructions: Large image shown below the article header.

fields.label: Introduction text
fields.name: intro_text
fields.instructions: Short intro paragraph shown before the main article body.

fields.label: Reading time (optional)
fields.name: reading_time
fields.instructions: Leave empty to auto-calculate based on word count (200 wpm). Fill only if you want to override.

fields.label: Author (optional)
fields.name: author
fields.instructions: Override the author name shown in the article meta sidebar. Leave empty to use the WordPress post author.
